subject: Re: Noise2Map error - LibTorchSharp
body:
Hi Juliana,

This seems like a problem specific to your setup... did you install into a
fresh conda environment yourself or is there something else funny going on?
I get a working environment following the installation instructions on the
website...
https://warpem.github.io/warp/user_guide/warptools/installation/

Cheers,

Alister


On Tue, 22 Apr 2025 at 15:37, Juliana FR Mello <foncor@gmail.com> wrote:

> Hi everyone,
>
> I'm having an error when I try to run Noise2Map. I'm trying to run it with
> just one tomogram and it crashes trying to load the library LibTorchSharp.
> I tried to create a symbolic link inside /home/exx/.conda/envs/warp/bin,
> but I still have the same error.
> Does anyone know how to fix this?
>
> Thanks!
> Juliana
>
> Command: Noise2Map --observation1 even --observation2 odd --angpix 13.6
> --batchsize 4 --dont_flatten_spectrum true --iterations 10000
> --dont_augment true --gpuid_preprocess 0 --gpuid_network 0
>
> Here is my terminal output:
>  Loading mask... done.
>
> Preparing data:
> Preparing Position_1_2_13.60Apx...  Done.
>
> Loading model, 22963 MB free.
> Unhandled exception. System.DllNotFoundException: Unable to load shared
> library 'LibTorchSharp' or one of its dependencies. In order to help
> diagnose loading problems, consider using a tool like strace. If you're
> using glibc, consider setting the LD_DEBUG environment variable:
> /home/exx/.conda/envs/warp/bin/LibTorchSharp.so: cannot open shared object
> file: No such file or directory
> libtorch.so: cannot open shared object file: No such file or directory
> /home/exx/.conda/envs/warp/bin/../lib/libLibTorchSharp.so: undefined
> symbol:
> _ZTv0_n104_NK5torch2nn11MaxPoolImplILm2ENS0_13MaxPool2dImplEE12pretty_printERSo
> /home/exx/.conda/envs/warp/bin/LibTorchSharp: cannot open shared object
> file: No such file or directory
> /home/exx/.conda/envs/warp/bin/libLibTorchSharp: cannot open shared object
> file: No such file or directory
>
>    at TorchSharp.NN.Modules.THSNN_UNet3D_ctor(Int64 depth_block, Int64
> width_block, Int64 max_width, Int64 input_channels, Int64 final_channels,
> Boolean residual_u, Boolean usegroupnorm, Boolean progressivedepth, IntPtr&
> pBoxedModule)
>    at TorchSharp.NN.Modules.UNet3D(Int64 depth_block, Int64 width_block,
> Int64 max_width, Int64 input_channels, Int64 final_channels, Boolean
> residual_u, Boolean usegroupnorm, Boolean progressivedepth) in
> /usr/share/miniconda/envs/package-build/conda-bld/warp_1737588682413/work/TorchSharp/NN/UNet3D.cs:line
> 29
>    at Warp.NoiseNet3DTorch.<.ctor>b__23_0(Int32 i, Int32 threadID) in
> /usr/share/miniconda/envs/package-build/conda-bld/warp_1737588682413/work/WarpLib/NNModels/NoiseNet3DTorch.cs:line
> 81
>    at Warp.Tools.Helper.ForCPU(Int32 fromInclusive, Int32 toExclusive,
> Int32 nThreads, Action`1 funcSetup, Action`2 funcIterator, Action`1
> funcTeardown) in
> /usr/share/miniconda/envs/package-build/conda-bld/warp_1737588682413/work/WarpLib/Tools/Helper.cs:line
> 736
>    at Warp.NoiseNet3DTorch..ctor(int3 boxDimensions, Int32[] devices,
> Int32 batchSize, Int32 depth, Boolean progressiveDepth, Int32 maxWidth) in
> /usr/share/miniconda/envs/package-build/conda-bld/warp_1737588682413/work/WarpLib/NNModels/NoiseNet3DTorch.cs:line
> 77
>    at Noise2Map.Noise2Map.Main(String[] args) in
> /usr/share/miniconda/envs/package-build/conda-bld/warp_1737588682413/work/Noise2Map/Noise2Map.cs:line
> 421
> Aborted (core dumped)
